name: Backup @Ignister
name_jp: バックアップ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc: If you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 DARK Cyberse monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Backup @Ignister", then discard 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Backup @Ignister" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 DARK Cyberse monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Backup @Ignister", then discard 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Backup @Ignister" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Cyberse monster that was Special Summoned from the Extra Deck: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Backup @Ignister" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
